mapper.sql: id, plan_name, task_type, receiver_type, receiver_ids_json, msg_type, payload_version, payload_json, template_id, creator, remark, schedule_type, schedule_rule_json, effective_start_at, effective_end_at, window_start_time, window_end_time, rate_per_minute, timezone, next_trigger_time, last_trigger_time, plan_status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into mass_task_plan ( plan_name, task_type, receiver_type, receiver_ids_json, msg_type, payload_version, payload_json, template_id, creator, remark, schedule_type, schedule_rule_json, effective_start_at, effective_end_at, window_start_time, window_end_time, rate_per_minute, timezone, next_trigger_time, last_trigger_time, plan_status, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{planName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{receiverType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{receiverIdsJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{msgType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{payloadVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payloadJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{templateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{scheduleType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{scheduleRuleJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{effectiveStartAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveEndAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{windowStartTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{windowEndTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ratePerMinute,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{timezone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nextTriggerTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastTriggerTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{planStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select:
select
from mass_task_plan order by create_time desc limit #{offset,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select
from mass_task_plan where plan_status = 1 and next_trigger_time is not null and next_trigger_time <= #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} and (effective_end_at is null or effective_end_at >= #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) order by next_trigger_time asc, id asc limit #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}
